heading: Background
body:
LangChain4j is a framework that simplifies the creation of LLM (Large Language Model)
applications in Java. LangChain4j combines concepts and functionality
from LangChain, Haystack, LlamaIndex, and other sources. You can use
this framework for a variety of use cases, including semantic search and
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).

By integrating MongoDB Vector Search with LangChain4j, you can use
MongoDB as a vector database and use MongoDB Vector Search to
implement RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) by using semantically similar documents
to answer queries. To learn more about RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation),
see [Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with MongoDB](ai-key-concepts).
